title: Das blaue Meer und Du
writer: Fritz Böttger, Per Schwenzen, Fred Ignor
actors: Fred Bertelmann, Karin Dor, Renate Ewert
plot: Director Heidebrink cannot prevent his daughter Helga from hitchhiking to the Adriatic Sea with her French friend Suzy. That's why he sends his employee Fred after them incognito. However, he becomes friends with the girls...
